title.en: This realm technique is called the Golden Eye R...

content.en:
There are many things that Ye Tian should improve now, such as the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, the Great Dao Prototype and the Origin Divine Power, or the Realm Technique.

The Realm Technique is one of the inheritances of the Realm Realm, and it is one of the necessary techniques for practitioners in the inner world.

It's a pity that although Ye Tian's universe has cultivated the inner universe, he has no realm art inheritance.

And the Holy Ape Inheritance that Ye Tian obtained happened to record a realm technique, but it was only a relatively simple realm technique, which could be called an inferior realm technique!

The art of the realm is very precious, even in the realm realm, it is one of the extremely rare inheritances, and many small forces do not know the art of the realm at all.

Ye Tian was able to obtain the technique of the inferior realm, which was also very good, and he could increase his strength by a certain amount.

This realm technique is called the Golden Eye Realm!

Once this realm technique is practiced, when it is used, the enemy will have a feeling of being stared at by a golden eye in the dark, and will not only be restrained and suppressed by the realm technique, but also produce a certain sense of fear and panic.

The general Lower Realm Technique can at most exert the power of the inner world, while the Golden Eye Realm can exert the power of the inner world at best, and it can be regarded as a very good realm technique among the lower realm techniques.

Ye Tian was the first to comprehend the Golden Eye Realm, and once he practiced it, he could immediately increase his combat power a lot, which was more cost-effective than cultivating other things.

Since it is an inferior realm technique, it is not difficult to comprehend, plus Ye Tian has a super god-level super comprehension talent, and his own comprehension is also extremely against the sky, so his cultivation speed is very fast.

In just tens of thousands of years, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated into the Golden Eye Realm!

After practicing, Ye Tian began to test the power of this realm technique.

There were also a lot of lifeforms in the universe in Ye Tian's body, and there were even some earth-honoring creatures that he had put in the interior.

Immediately.

He unleashed an Earth-Honorable creature and cast the Golden Eye Realm on it.

Rumble!!!!

In the eyes of this earth-level creature, a golden pupil with terrifying majesty stared at it, and a huge pressure hit it, making it almost unable to move.

Fear is all over the body!

The next moment, its pupils dilated infinitely, and its soul gradually shattered in endless fear.

It's dead!

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was surprised.

He didn't do anything to this earth-level creature, although this creature was very weak, but the little fear effect attached to the Golden Eye Realm actually killed it directly.

Now, the Golden Eye Realm is only an entry level, and if it is promoted to the Xiaocheng, Dacheng, and Consummation realms, its power will be even stronger.

In the following days, Ye Tian comprehended the Golden Eye Realm while cultivating the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, occasionally comprehending the Great Dao and improving the prototype of the Great Dao.

As for the Origin Divine Power, Ye Tian temporarily gave up the Origin Divine Power, and after he had almost improved to the limit in other aspects, he would slowly comprehend and create the Origin Divine Power.

After all, if you want to create a stronger Origin Divine Power, it takes not a little time, but a long time.

As time passed, Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger.

And Ye Tian's ranking on the True Monarch List is also getting higher and higher, from the 62nd place on the True Monarch List at the beginning, all the way to the top 50 and top 30 on the True Monarch List......

this day.

Ye Tian's Golden Ape Alchemy Technique had reached the third major achievement peak realm, which was equivalent to the ninth level of the highest realm of the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter.

The cultivation of the Golden Ape Alchemy to this realm cost Ye Tian almost half of his resources, which is enough to see how terrifying the Golden Ape Alchemy is to consume resources, but it also makes Ye Tian achieve the number one combat power on the True Monarch List.

Now, although Ye Tian's physical strength is still far from the True Monarch's extreme, it is much stronger than other True Monarchs, plus Ye Tian has several Origin Divine Powers and powerful Dao Rudiments, so his combat power has jumped to the first place on the True Monarch List, and no one can match him.

"The third major achievement of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique is the peak realm, the prototype of the avenue is 99,942 meters, the Golden Eye Realm is the Dacheng realm, and the three major origin divine powers of divine power, God Annihilation, and Blood River True Body are at the peak of Xiaocheng......"

This is Ye Tian's current cultivation progress, which can be described as very terrifying.

Ye Tian became the number one True Monarch on the list, many True Monarchs congratulated one after another, and the power of the Void Heaven Hall also surpassed many big forces in an instant, and it was even expected to compete with top big forces such as the Chaos Trading House.

Of course, this only represents the forces in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

But even so, in the era when the True Ancestor could not come, Ye Tian was the foundation of the Void Heaven Palace's suppression of other forces.

After all, the half-step True Ancestor was almost in retreat and cultivating, preparing for the impact on the True Ancestor, and almost did not participate in other things, and the Half-Step True Ancestor was not very convenient to bully the True Monarch, otherwise it would be tantamount to breaking the rules.

Therefore, no one could restrain Ye Tian.

Originally, Ye Tian was ready to continue the retreat and advance his strength to a stronger level, after all, he was not enough in many aspects, and he could continue to improve, far from reaching the extreme of the True Monarch.

But at this time, a big thing happened in the outside world.

Therefore, Ye Tian could not continue to retreat and cultivate.

......

Celestial Ape Giant City, an attic somewhere.

Ye Tian meets with Yanglong Zhenjun.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, something big has happened to the human race, I can't deal with it, I can only inform the master!"

Yanglong Zhenjun hurriedly said.

"What the hell is going on!"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is a strange place in the territory of the human race, and the strong people above the cosmic god cannot enter, only the weak human race can enter. And after some Terrans came out, their physical bodies became very strong, and their bloodlines also became very powerful, as if they had been reborn. Yanglong Zhenjun said: "At the beginning, this did not cause any sensation, after all, no one cares about the chances below the cosmic gods, and the weakest of those big forces are above the Heavenly Monarch, who cares about the weak! But the key is that those Terrans who came out of the mysterious place have grown too fast, and more and more Terrans have been transformed by that mysterious place, and they have become geniuses one by one, these people have basically reached the gods after cultivation, and they are not weak gods, but six or seven star gods!"

"Six or Seven Star Gods Will !!"

Only then did Ye Tian realize how rebellious the fate of that mysterious place was.

The human race has always been very weak in the foundation before, and it will be difficult for four or five star gods to be born, and what is the concept of six or seven star gods, and it is difficult for those top forces to cultivate too much!

But the human race has given birth to a large number of six- and seven-star god generals one after another, occupying many positions on the god general list.

This caused a huge sensation at once, and many top powers began to probe the situation of the human race.

Suddenly, the mysterious place could not be hidden.

The news leaked, and many top powers began to observe the human race and observe the mysterious place.

Yanglong True Monarch is just an ordinary True Monarch, even if his cultivation is now promoted to the late stage of True Monarch, he is still an ant, where can he stop other True Monarchs, even the Void Heaven Palace is difficult to completely protect the human race, after all, this matter has too much impact.

Unless the Void Heaven Temple is willing to offend all the forces at the same time, this is simply unrealistic!
